base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mushroom_powerup_static — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1985 super mario bros. Static red mushroom with white spots — travels horizontally on ground after emerging from block. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static red mushroom with white spots — travels horizontally on ground after emerging from block; no per-frame animation; physics-driven motion only
